\tzpentry{ID3442}{Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3442 introduces Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \phi_k = k \cdot \gamma_{gold} \pmod{2\pi} $$
